titleStmt.title: SII 7.273: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 273. (A.R. No. 91 of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE JANARDANA TEMPLE AT KAP, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmacāravē . trayilōkyanaga
rāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti . śrījeyādbhudaya
śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1421 saṁdu yeraḍaveya va¨rtamā
na siddhā¨rthi saṁvatsarada dhanumāsa 29neya śukravāradalū śrīmatu
śuṁkadoḍeyarāda kuṁda haggaḍeyarū baṁdu Āśrayisidavarū
naṁmoḷēkastharāgi tirumale Arasarāda mada hegaḍeyarigū Āsiri
sidavarigū barasi biṭṭa śilāśāśānada kramaveṁteṁdare . bhūmi
yū caṁdranū Uḷali pa¨ryyaṁtaraṁ salludu kāpu yeraḍu sthāna
kūḷoḷage baṁdu hoṟage Aṁmmaṭha Arasu Ānaṁtigaḷali yeḍekoṭare naṁ
ma Aḷu Aṁbu Āri kopparigeyanū yittu naṁma Anuvara nu ja
yisikoḍuvevu naṁmoḷage vobbara yidirige vobbaru madhariṁ
ḍasalladu niṁma yidirige baha Anusarigaḷige nerana ko
ḍasalladu vobbaru biṭṭu vobbaru nilasalladu naṁma yiru
vara kūḍe mōharsi bahaṁthāvara bhaṁḍebuddhiyiṁda vadhisi
da yidhirāda Anusarigaḷanū jayisikoṁbeU naṁma yi
bbaroḷage manastāpagaḷu baṁdare buddhiyiṁdalē pariharsi
koḷabēkallade tuḍuki kādasalladu . Ī vakhkhaṇekege nāU tappi
dare yeṁṭughaṭṭadalli yiḷiva yettugaḷa koṁda dōśa . gaṁgeya
taṭiyalli sāvira kavileya koṁda dōśa . vāraṇāsiyiṁda
rāmēśvara pa¨ryyaṁtara prathiṣṭeyāda liṁgavanū kitta dōśa . yī
śilāśāsanada Aḍakake tappuvavarallaveṁdu baradu koṭṭa śi
lāśāsana . yī kaṭṭige pāṁḍyadēvarasavoḍeyara voppu . naṁda
ṇekeya dayivagaḷige tappidavaru . śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 7.273 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
